invariant_checks.label: No vote-prediction / candidate-distance / abstention-calibration keys in aggregate output
invariant_checks.detail: forbidden keys checked = [predictedVote, candidateDistance, voteProbability, abstainProbability, alpha_year, predictedAbstainCount, stageBResult]; none present

invariant_checks.label: Every year's 9 position-node marginals are finite
invariant_checks.detail: all years × 9 nodes pass finite check

invariant_checks.label: Every year's MAT×CD / CD×CU / MOR×PRO joints are 5×5 and sum to 1
invariant_checks.detail: all 3 joints × all years sum to 1

invariant_checks.label: engagement_x_turnout_proxy is explicitly omitted with documented reason in every year
invariant_checks.detail: all years carry omission status + reason

engagement_x_turnout_proxy.reason: SyntheticElectorateRow carries no turnout / abstention field — vote choice, abstention, candidate distance, and counterfactual outputs are downstream projections of the synthetic electorate, not source fields on the row contract. This joint will be filled when the downstream simulator publishes a per-row turnout / abstention projection.
